# Upgrade Speedrift/Driftdriver first, then implement the approved State System upgrade across State System, paia-contracts, paia-agent-runtime, paia-os, Pi harness agents, and Paia agents while preserving model agency under code-owned schema, policy, budget, freshness, authorization, and audit gates. Spec - Drift Anchor

*Generated by PlanForge V2 on 2026-07-18. Session: `20260718-state-system-upgrade`. This is a drift anchor, not a standalone product brief.*

## End State

Speedrift control-plane gates pass before downstream work begins. The implementation ends in one decisive posture: observe-only State System package/content/usage telemetry is enabled, State System owns an append-only hash-chained redacted audit ledger for context decisions and acknowledge_gap, paia-os owns redacted external-effect receipts, and a fully tested fail-closed StateActionGate exists only for the selected messaging send path but remains disabled unless a separate explicit human approval gate record is present. No calendar, email/publish, source-control commit, broad delivery executor, CRM, or additional protected-action expansion is implemented or scheduled in this plan. The model retains agency for semantic relevance, declared-route proposals, caveat wording, and bounded repair suggestions; code owns schema validation, ref validation, freshness arithmetic, route policy, budget handling, governance verdicts, idempotency, receipt persistence, authorization, and all external effects.

## Acceptance Criteria

- Driftdriver pins speedrift-lane-sdk to an audited immutable ref, passes repo-local runtime gate tests, restores the missing reaper regression, and verifies Workgraph/Pi compatibility before State System edits begin.
- State System packages and reports expose content_status, event_status, index_status, probe_status, and completeness_status with evidence refs and reasons; index, event, probe, package-generation, and process success are never converted into generic content freshness.
- paia-contracts publishes strict frozen Pydantic protocol contracts and matching JSON Schemas for request, response, error, handshake, context decision, usage receipt, messaging authorization, audit-ledger entry, external-effect receipt, and gap acknowledgement objects.
- State System exposes handshake, inspect, validate, refresh, search, record, repair, and acknowledge_gap through stable JSON envelopes, model-facing help, bounded repair guidance, and no model-visible tracebacks.
- State System persists StateContextDecision and acknowledge_gap records in an append-only hash-chained redacted ledger with 400-day redacted entry retention, seven-year chain-head checkpoint retention, no raw private corpus content, and tests for tamper detection, redaction, idempotency, and retention pruning.
- paia-os persists external-effect receipts for the messaging canary and gate tests with 400-day redacted summary retention, seven-year receipt hash/idempotency index retention, no message bodies, and tests for allowed, denied, observe would-block, failed, retried, queued, committed, redacted, and pruned states.
- paia-agent-runtime records typed observe-only package/content/usage decisions for present, absent, invalid, wrong-bound, expired, stale, unknown, omitted, oversized, and truncated packages, while preserving a non-truncatable policy header for declared state-dependent routes.
- Instructor is limited to bounded model proposals and shape repair; code independently validates schemas, refs, freshness, governance, budgets, idempotency, authorization, and receipt ownership.
- One messaging send path has a tested fail-closed gate and observe canary. Production remains observe-only and messaging fail-closed remains disabled unless a separate explicit human approval gate record is recorded and verified by code.
- Pi harness and Paia agents declare instance/persona/state scopes and state-dependent routes, preserve selected_model/fallback_model IDs from the live Pi-resolvable set, and record Agency-to-Pi fallback receipts without arming speedriftd or changing authority mode.
- Required integration, upstream, dead-code, adversarial, route-gating, e2e canary, Paia-agent canary, drift, review, and handoff artifacts demonstrate zero protected messaging effects without correlated package hash, freshness decision, route/action declaration, governance verdict, authorization decision, idempotency key, and paia-os receipt.

## Out Of Scope

- Do not force a State System refresh on every ordinary conversation turn.
- Do not copy raw private corpora into State System, receipts, eval artifacts, or federation packages.
- Do not let Instructor authorize actions, silently choose hidden routes, mark stale evidence fresh, or rewrite user intent.
- Do not reinterpret legacy ok/status values without schema versioning and compatibility tests.
- Do not implement or schedule calendar, email/publish, source-control commit, CRM mutation, broad delivery executor, or any non-messaging protected-action expansion in this plan.
- Do not enable messaging fail-closed behavior in production unless a separate explicit human approval gate record is present and code-verifiable.
- Do not modify repository files during this planning repair task.

## Speedrift Modules

- coredrift (required): Baseline contract, task scope, and runtime authority checks gate every phase.
- specdrift (required): Protocol schemas, package contracts, audit ledger entries, and receipt formats must stay aligned with the approved spec.
- depsdrift (required): The Speedrift SDK pin and paia-contracts releases are dependency-sensitive across downstream repos.
- datadrift (required): Content, event, index, probe, completeness, ledger retention, and redaction semantics are data-contract critical.
- archdrift (required): Cross-system State System/runtime/paia-os trust boundaries require architecture drift review.
- uxdrift (required): Model-operable CLI help, stable errors, and visible evidence limitations are first-class acceptance criteria.
- qadrift (required): Regression coverage must verify schema, CLI, runtime, receipt, canary, and eval behavior.
- secdrift (required): Protected messaging, governance verdicts, authorization tokens, package authenticity, receipts, redaction, and audit integrity are security-sensitive.
- yagnidrift (required): Legacy raw-pg parsing, partial validators, duplicate schemas, and unused route configs must be removed after parity.
- fixdrift (required): Bounded fix loops must be enforced for gate failures, adversarial bypasses, and compatibility regressions.
- redrift (required): Adversarial review must probe bypasses without live sends or private corpus extraction.
- plandrift (required): Plan integrity and Workgraph dependency shape are critical for multi-repository sequencing.
- factorydrift (required): Workgraph/Pi executor compatibility and Agency fallback must be preserved.
- northstardrift (recommended): Ensures the model-mediated, code-enforced outcome stays aligned with the approved State System upgrade goal.
- reviewdrift (recommended): RoboRev, architecture/security review, and handoff closeout need explicit tracking.
- agencydrift (required): Agency fallback to Pi, model propagation, and non-arming runtime authority must be auditable.

- full cross-repo verification: `cd /Users/braydon/projects/experiments/driftdriver && uv run pytest && cd /Users/braydon/projects/paia-contracts && uv run pytest && cd /Users/braydon/projects/state-system && uv run pytest && cd /Users/braydon/projects/paia-agent-runtime && uv run pytest && cd /Users/braydon/projects/paia-os && uv run pytest && cd /Users/braydon/projects/paia-agents && uv run pytest` (pre_handoff)

- source freshness dimensions and adapters: `cd /Users/braydon/projects/state-system && uv run pytest tests/test_content_status_dimensions.py tests/test_adapter_drive_status_basis.py tests/test_adapter_beeper_status_basis.py tests/test_adapter_garmin_status_basis.py tests/test_adapter_zulip_status_basis.py tests/test_adapter_repository_status_basis.py tests/test_adapter_linear_status_basis.py tests/test_adapter_transcript_status_basis.py tests/test_known_stale_source_status_basis.py` - Content, event, index, probe, and completeness statuses remain separate for every touched adapter family.
- State System audit ledger: `cd /Users/braydon/projects/state-system && uv run pytest tests/test_state_audit_ledger.py tests/test_gap_acknowledgement_ledger.py tests/test_state_audit_retention.py` - Context decisions and acknowledge_gap records are append-only, hash-chained, redacted, idempotent, tamper-detecting, and retention-prunable.
- runtime package decisions and messaging action gate: `cd /Users/braydon/projects/paia-agent-runtime && uv run pytest tests/test_state_system_package.py tests/test_state_context_decision.py tests/test_state_context_pressure.py tests/test_instructor_state_proposals.py tests/test_model_proposal_ref_validation.py tests/test_state_action_gate.py` - Package loading, binding, hash, expiry, context pressure, Instructor proposal validation, and messaging StateActionGate logic pass without enabling production fail-closed mode.
- paia-os governance and external-effect receipts: `cd /Users/braydon/projects/paia-os && uv run pytest tests/test_state_system_governance_adapter.py tests/test_state_external_effect_receipts.py tests/test_state_effect_receipt_retention.py` - Governance verdicts and external-effect receipts are code-owned, redacted, correlated, and retention-prunable.
- CLI/API/PAIA envelope parity: `cd /Users/braydon/projects/state-system && uv run pytest tests/test_api_surface.py tests/test_cli_model_operable.py && cd /Users/braydon/projects/paia-agent-runtime && uv run pytest tests/test_company_state_typed_client.py` - State System CLI, API dispatcher, and paia-agent-runtime typed client return the same versioned response and error semantics.
- messaging protected-effect fail-closed gate disabled by default: `cd /Users/braydon/projects/paia-agent-runtime && uv run pytest tests/integration/test_protected_messaging_fail_closed_gate.py tests/integration/test_messaging_gate_approval_record.py` - Messaging direct-send paths fail closed in deterministic tests when the explicit approval gate is present and token is missing/stale, but production config remains disabled without the approval record.
- protected messaging observe canary: `cd /Users/braydon/projects/paia-agent-runtime && uv run pytest tests/integration/test_protected_messaging_observe_gate.py` - Messaging send path records would-allow and would-block receipts without changing delivery behavior while observe mode is enabled.
- state system end-to-end canary: `cd /Users/braydon/projects/paia-agent-runtime && uv run pytest tests/integration/test_state_system_e2e_canary.py` - Inspect, package validation, model proposal, code validation, governance verdict, messaging gate decision, and receipts correlate in observe-only mode.
- adversarial model-agency evaluation: `cd /Users/braydon/projects/paia-agent-runtime && uv run pytest tests/evals/test_state_system_adversarial.py` - Adversarial cases cannot bypass schema, route, freshness, governance, authorization, receipt, or model-agency boundaries and every case records a verdict.
- state-dependent route gating: `cd /Users/braydon/projects/paia-agent-runtime && uv run pytest tests/test_state_dependent_route_gating.py tests/test_state_answer_limitations.py` - Declared state-dependent routes cannot silently use generic memory/tool fallback when package evidence is required but absent, invalid, omitted, expired, stale, or wrong-bound.
- Paia agent canary: `cd /Users/braydon/projects/paia-agents && uv run pytest tests/evals/test_state_system_agent_canary.py` - A canary Paia agent receives the correct package binding, visible gaps, declared state scope, Agency/Pi fallback receipt, and observe-only messaging gate signals.
- Agency to Pi fallback receipt: `cd /Users/braydon/projects/experiments/driftdriver && uv run pytest tests/test_agency_pi_fallback_receipt.py tests/test_workgraph_pi_compatibility.py` - Fallback records selected_model/fallback_model preservation and proves speedriftd mode is not armed or changed.
- model-facing CLI help and repair guidance: `cd /Users/braydon/projects/state-system && uv run pytest tests/ux/test_model_operable_help.py tests/ux/test_cli_error_repair_guidance.py` - Help text and JSON errors explain purpose, non-purpose, effect class, examples, retryability, acknowledgement, retention, and next steps without tracebacks.
- visible evidence limitations: `cd /Users/braydon/projects/paia-agent-runtime && uv run pytest tests/test_state_answer_limitations.py tests/ux/test_state_context_limitations_copy.py` - Models see stale, unknown, incomplete, omitted, and truncation limitations for state-dependent routes without code silently deciding semantic answer choices.
- waiver Live source adapter credentials and private corpora: CI and adversarial review must not access live Drive, Beeper, Garmin, Zulip, repository, Linear, MsgVault, Spotify, memory, Folio, or transcript credentials; deterministic fixture packages, mocked adapter watermarks, schema validation, and redacted ledger tests substitute for live credentials. - waiver Live external messaging sends: No tests may send real messages; deterministic fake messaging transports, dry-run delivery executors, would-block receipts, idempotency fixtures, and explicit approval-record fixtures substitute for external sends. - waiver LaunchAgent scheduling in CI: CI must not install or wait for real LaunchAgents; manifest fixtures, clock-controlled scheduler tests, fake launchd status, lock-wait simulations, and manual runbook verification substitute for live scheduling. (approved by planning_policy_deterministic_substitute)

## Risks

- False green source freshness could authorize answers or messaging effects from stale, index-only, event-only, or probe-only evidence. [high]: Separate content, event, index, probe, and completeness statuses; add per-adapter tests, route-level sufficiency declarations, datadrift gates, and model-mediated evals that block freshness collapse.
- Messaging gate could cause availability regression if fail-closed is enabled before explicit approval. [high]: Default production to observe-only, test fail-closed with fixtures only, require code-verifiable human approval gate record, and preserve rollback flags.
- Receipt ownership confusion could duplicate, lose, or over-retain sensitive audit data. [high]: State System owns only context decisions and acknowledge_gap ledger; paia-os owns external-effect receipts; both use redaction, retention tests, tamper/retention checks, and no raw corpus/message bodies.
- Shared contracts can drift from generated JSON Schemas or downstream consumers. [high]: Make paia-contracts canonical, add deterministic schema exports, upstream consumption eval, and schema-version negotiation.
- Instructor or model proposals could accidentally assume code-owned authority. [high]: Bound Instructor to shape repair and declared proposal schemas; code rejects invalid refs, stale-as-fresh claims, hidden route swaps, governance overrides, and authorization construction; objective evals require 0 bypasses.
- Agency unavailable or model registry churn could break task execution or model assignment. [medium]: Use only allowed live Pi-resolvable model IDs, record Agency fallback receipts, and rerun Workgraph/Pi compatibility after binding changes.
- Deterministic substitutes may miss live-credential, live-send, or LaunchAgent behavior. [medium]: Formal waivers require fixture, fake transport, and clock-controlled substitutes plus explicit manual handoff notes for any production approval outside this plan.
